examples: Hundreds of children were treated for smoke inhalation.
They were taken to the hospital suffering from smoke inhalation.
It is transmitted between animals and humans by the bite of infected fleas, direct contact, inhalation and rarely, ingestion of infective materials.
However, the real danger is from inhalation or injection of the protein as opposed to ingestion.
The woman and two children were all treated for the effects of smoke inhalation.
